description: touched fires on bind:checked change (§55.7). Checking #agree flips signup.agree.touched true (and the checkbox value to true); the un-interacted name field stays touched false; submitted stays false.
rationale: §55.7 touched's second trigger is a bind:checked change. Confirms the trigger is the interaction TYPE-agnostic 'first interaction with the field' rule, per-field, and that a checkbox interaction does not submit.
